violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No person trained as a food safety manager was present during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2025

The front pizza prep kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
The hood system was observed with an excess of debris. The hood system must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No person trained as a food safety manager was present during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by equipment and fry oil. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The front pizza prep kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer, ice cream stick blender were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Canned sauce and frozen commercially prepared meatballs were not heated prior to being placed in hot hold before being placed into hot holding. Ready to eat foods taken from a commercially processed can or intact package from a food processing plant must be heated to at least 135 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Items were only placed in hot hold 20 minutes before inspection. Items were placed in oven to be heated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. The lid to the chest freezer in the back storage area was observed in poor condition. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

The condensate from the walk in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. The condensate from the ice cream freezer was observed in excess frozen inside of the machine. Establishment must defrost. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to areas of food or food item storage must be self closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025
The hood system was observed with an excess of debris. The hood system must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The handsink in the kitchen is not conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Establishment must install a conveniently located handsink in the kitchen. Establishment is to provide RIDOH with picture once installed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024

Knives are stored on unclean surfaces side of oven and wall between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Knives were moved to dishwasher. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the wall behind the prep tables, gaskets on prep units, area behind three bay and cook line have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

The condensate from the dough refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. The condensate from the ice cream freezer was observed in excess frozen inside of the machine. Establishment must defrost. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
The receptacle in the unisex toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
The door to the back toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet rooms that open to areas of storage/prep must be self closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2024
